Triple Chamber · 3G Live Resin

Crashout

Three chambers. Three strains. One device. Rotate between Sex & Candy, Toad Venom, and Sweet Caviar without ever swapping pens. The display shows which chamber is active and exactly how much is left.

Dual Chamber · 2G

The Switch

Two strains. One device. An AirPods-style case that makes it look like nothing. The display tracks puff count and battery on both chambers independently. Discreet by design.

Lit Balm

About

Born in
Los Angeles.

6teen started with a simple problem: disposables that look cheap, taste cheap, and die halfway through. We built something different.

Every device is engineered around one idea — the person using it deserves better. Better hardware, better oil, better experience.

LA-based. We know what quality looks like. 6teen is that standard.

FAQ

Straight Answers.

The Crashout is 6teen's triple-chamber device — Sex & Candy, Toad Venom, and Sweet Caviar in one unit. 3G live resin total. Display shows active strain, battery, and puff count. Available in 6 colorways.
Exactly what it says. We name things after what they are, not what sounds safe.
2G dual-chamber device with a digital display tracking puff count and battery per side. Comes with an AirPods-style matte white case. Discreet by design.
Ten: Toad Venom, Bubble Yum, Drank Grape, Promethazine, Zour Tangie, Baja 6, Peach Lini, Mystery Flavor, Z Nerdz, and Cherry Caviar.
Use the contact form below and we'll get you sorted.
Yes. Every product goes through third-party lab testing. Clean oil, clean hardware, clean results.
